notes: TARGET = a local, air-gapped, SQLite-backed soft-delete endpoint (tools/softdelete_target/app.py). DummyJSON is NOT used and NOT modified: it never persists and exposes no queryable DB, so the deleted_at / DB-row / collection-exclusion assertions are unverifiable against it. The harness namespaces each created resource's field values with run_id + agent + case index so the four agents can run against one DB without their resources being confused; ids are server-generated UUID-hex strings so there are never collisions. Each run exercises case_count independent create->delete->verify lifecycles; the Soft Delete Correctness Rate is the fraction passing the full combined condition.
